hooks.command: bash -c 'h="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/on-session-start.sh"; if [ ! -x "$h" ]; then r=$(cat "$HOME/.claude/doey/repo-path" 2>/dev/null); h="$r/.claude/hooks/on-session-start.sh"; fi; [ -x "$h" ] && exec "$h" "$@" || exit 0' --
